label: Foundation
description: Cross-cutting literacies that support every other capability.

label: Water
description: Storage, treatment, testing, and planning for safe water access.

label: Food
description: Pantry design, preservation boundaries, seed starting, and garden planning.

label: Shelter
description: Building envelope, weatherization, and moisture management.

label: Repair
description: Basic tools, shutoffs, sealing, patching, and first-response maintenance.

label: Power
description: Electrical literacy, load auditing, runtime estimation, and backup planning.

label: Community
description: Local resource mapping, teach-forward transfer, and coordination.

label: Concept
description: Explains a principle, model, or mental framework.

label: Skill
description: Observable action a learner can perform.

label: Project
description: Applied task that creates a useful artifact or plan.

label: Foundation
description: Cross-cutting basics and entry-level literacies.

label: Household
description: Capabilities that directly stabilize a household.

label: Productive
description: Capabilities that create ongoing output or self-provisioning.

label: Community
description: Capabilities that coordinate and share at the local level.

label: Advanced
description: Higher-complexity design or system stewardship work.

label: Free
description: Requires little or no direct spending.

label: Low
description: Can usually be started with modest household-level spending.

label: Medium
description: Typically requires moderate spending or specialized supplies.

label: High
description: Likely requires significant spending or capital equipment.

label: Low
description: Low immediate hazard when done within normal bounds.

label: Moderate
description: Requires more careful interpretation, handling, or escalation boundaries.

label: High
description: Higher-stakes or specialized work with narrower safety margins.

label: Draft
description: Initial working version, not yet reviewed.

label: Reviewed
description: Reviewed for coherence or subject-matter quality.

label: Verified
description: Verified through review and/or field testing.

label: Deprecated
description: Retained for record only; superseded or no longer recommended.

label: Compiled
description: Structured from existing knowledge but not yet formally reviewed.

label: Reviewed
description: Reviewed by a subject-matter steward.

label: Field Tested
description: Used in practice and documented.

label: Replicated
description: Repeated successfully across multiple contexts.

label: General
description: Applies broadly without a narrow context assumption.

label: Renter
description: Adapted for renters or limited-permission occupants.

label: Homeowner
description: Adapted for owner-controlled dwellings.

label: Urban
description: Adapted for dense or city contexts.

label: Rural
description: Adapted for rural contexts.

label: Low Budget
description: Prioritizes low-cost or resource-constrained options.

label: Off Grid
description: Relevant where utilities are limited or absent.

label: Apartment
description: Adapted for apartments or small indoor spaces.

label: Cold Climate
description: Relevant to colder climates or heating-dominant seasons.

label: Hot Climate
description: Relevant to hotter climates or cooling-dominant seasons.
